def rounded_avg(n, m):
    """Your input consists of two positive integers, n and m. Compute the mean of numbers from n up to m, inclusive, round to the closest integer, and output its binary form. Return -1 if n > m.
Example:
rounded_avg(1, 5) => "0b11"
rounded_avg(7, 5) => -1
rounded_avg(10, 20) => "0b1111"
rounded_avg(20, 33) => "0b11010"
"""
